summary: The memory unit the generic parser consults BEFORE parsing: shape-signature (field names only, never values/PII) -> remembered kind in O(1); detection by field overlap against parser_registry kinds on miss, then remember. Operator can pin/forget. Button-click surface on the Fill tab.

files.role: kind -> fieldJoins registry that detection scores against (the parseable surface)
resolveParse: the 🧠 Parse-resolver panel (provenance display: memory-hit vs detected)

routes.summary: memory-first resolution; detects + remembers on miss
drop a memory so the next resolve re-detects

tests.role: shape-only signatures (no PII), detect/remember/recall, pin overrides, persistence across instances, stats
live resolve->memory-hit round-trip; self-cleans its shape (zero residue)

tables.name: parse_memory
tables.role: signature -> kind/config/hits/last_used; holds only real-use learnings (synthetic rows purged, tests self-clean)

docs.role: the memory-unit design + ankhor-side consult (meta-parser.ts) as future work

audit_findings.finding: parser-registry-OS direction: same engine over any kind via config; parse-memory adds the learned-dispatch layer on top

next_actions.note: remix core edit; deferred until the remix has npm i + typecheck available

next_actions.action: wire resolve into CSV import flow
next_actions.note: imports could auto-suggest the kind for unknown record shapes
